title: Ancient Alien Question: From UFOs to Extraterrestrial Visitations
original_title: Ancient Alien Question: From UFOs to Extraterrestrial Visitations
overview: Have we been visited by extraterrestrial beings?  Did these "ancient aliens" contribute to the birth of human civilization?  Do our ancient monuments contain evidence of their presence?
